hero.role: Full Stack Developer  ·  Motion & UI Engineer
hero.bio: I design and build production-grade web applications with a focus on performance, interaction quality, and scalable architecture. Available for freelance and full-time roles.

about.heading: About
about.intro: I'm a Full Stack Developer based in the Philippines with a focus on building fast, accessible, and visually refined web products. I work across the full stack — from REST APIs and database design to component architecture and production-grade UI animation.

blocks.title: How I Work
blocks.body: I approach every project with a clear separation of concerns — clean backend logic, well-structured frontend architecture, and intentional UI decisions. I write code that's readable, maintainable, and built to scale.

blocks.title: What Sets Me Apart
blocks.body: I combine strong engineering fundamentals with a deep understanding of motion and interaction design. This means I can own a feature end-to-end — from API design to the final pixel — without handing off between disciplines.

blocks.title: Outside of Work
blocks.body: I stay sharp through consistent learning, competitive gaming, and following developments in AI tooling. I believe the best engineers are curious people who never stop building.

about.location: Tagum City, Philippines · Open to Remote

experience.desc: Designing and delivering end-to-end web applications for clients — covering frontend architecture, backend API development, database design, and deployment. Projects span landing pages, SaaS tools, and AI-integrated products.

Built and shipped multiple production applications independently, including a marketplace platform, a portfolio CMS, and an AI-powered text tool. Focused on React, TypeScript, and performance-first UI development.

experience.role: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
experience.desc: Pursuing a degree in Computer Science with coursework in software engineering, machine learning, data structures, distributed systems, and mobile development.
Began learning to code independently, driven by curiosity about how software works. Built early projects in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript before moving into full stack development.

contact.heading: Open to Opportunities
contact.subtext: Available for freelance projects, contract work, and full-time positions. If you have a role or project in mind, I'd like to hear about it.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
